drafting_rules.ai_role: Describe furniture structure first; do not draw DXF directly.
drafting_rules.cad_role: Generate geometry only after user confirms template JSON.
drafting_rules.preview_role: Generate SVG/PNG shop drawing preview from same JSON used for DXF.

confirmation_questions: Are there hidden components that should appear in section view?
Should this generate DXF now or only preview first?
